mentions.note: Dividend growth stock hammered in past year; low enough to buy, but CVS is better with higher yield and Aetna integration.
Dividend growth stock hammered; low enough to buy but CVS better entry with higher yield and Aetna asset.
Medicare Advantage rates increased only 0.09% instead of 4-5% expected; stock fell 19%; harsh blow to profitable segment under Oz administration cost-cutting pressure.

Fighting back to legitimacy after credibility crisis; solid earnings expected; pristine health insurer rebuilding trust.
CEO Steve Hemsley returned in May 2025 and delivering upside surprises as expected. Company reported first of many upside beats. Stock up nearly 7%; believe it can return to former greatness.

First solid beat-and-raise in long time; CEO Steve Hemsley (juggernaut builder) returned; best managed care earnings in ages; stock trades 19x despite strength; was $600 in April 2025; group hated but Hemsley just getting started; deserves much higher valuation.
Quality healthcare company well-positioned in emerging healthcare leadership sector.
Managed care with legendary CEO Steve Hemsley back in charge; turning around from poor prior management; buy it.
